title: Staurogyne nudispica
taxonomy: Staurogyne nudispica is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the Americas, particularly in the tropical regions. Staurogyne nudispica is a type of herbaceous plant that belongs to the genus Staurogyne. The species is characterized by its distinctive small flowers and narrow leaves. The classification of Staurogyne nudispica places it within the larger group of angiosperms, specifically within the subclass Asteridae.
